news.title: Super Mario Wonder Breaks Sales Records
news.summary: Super Mario Wonder has become the fastest-selling Mario game of all time, with over 10 million copies sold in its first week of release.

news.title: New DLC Announced: Bowser's Revenge
news.summary: Nintendo has announced the first DLC for Super Mario Wonder, titled 'Bowser's Revenge', featuring new levels, power-ups, and challenges.

news.title: Super Mario Wonder Championship Announced
news.summary: Nintendo is hosting the first-ever Super Mario Wonder Championship, with qualifiers starting next month. Winners will compete in the finals in Tokyo.

news.title: Fan Creates Amazing Super Mario Wonder Artwork
news.summary: Check out this incredible fan art showcasing all the characters and transformations from Super Mario Wonder in a stunning panoramic piece.

news.title: Speedrunner Completes Super Mario Wonder in Under 2 Hours
news.summary: Professional speedrunner MarioMaster64 has set a new world record by completing Super Mario Wonder in just 1 hour and 58 minutes.

news.title: Super Mario Wonder Soundtrack Now Available
news.summary: The complete Super Mario Wonder soundtrack is now available on all major streaming platforms, featuring 78 tracks of magical Mario music.

news.title: Nintendo Announces Super Mario Wonder Tour
news.summary: Nintendo is taking Super Mario Wonder on tour with interactive exhibits, playable demos, and exclusive merchandise in major cities worldwide.

news.title: Hidden Easter Eggs Discovered in Super Mario Wonder
news.summary: Players have discovered dozens of hidden Easter eggs and references to classic Mario games throughout Super Mario Wonder.

news.title: Super Mario Wonder Patch 1.2.0 Released
news.summary: The latest patch for Super Mario Wonder adds new challenge levels, fixes bugs, and improves online multiplayer performance.

news.title: Super Mario Wonder Merchandise Collection Unveiled
news.summary: Nintendo has unveiled a new collection of Super Mario Wonder merchandise, including plushies, clothing, and collectibles featuring the game's characters.

news.title: Fan Creates Functional Wonder Flower Prop
news.summary: A talented fan has created a functional Wonder Flower prop that lights up and plays music from the game when activated.

news.title: Super Mario Wonder Developer Interview
news.summary: In an exclusive interview, the developers of Super Mario Wonder discuss the creative process behind the game's innovative features.
